title: [國際線要你1分鐘］ 去信加拿大國會，封信都幫你打埋，你淨係需要咁個send制

replies.msg:
加拿大戰線需要人！封信都幫你寫埋，你試吓就知！


Take action and email Prime Minister Trudeau and your Canadian Ministers today!
唔好等！一齊去信杜魯多總理及內閣成員！

We are running out of time.
It is absolutely disgusting that the CCP is seeking to quash all dissent with this abhorrent and draconian law.
打壓愈加猖獗，香港時日無多！
中共試圖用惡法剷除異己，甚至越界企圖操控香港及海外社群，手段令人震怒。

With the arrest of Jimmy Lai, Agnes Chow, Andy Li, Wilson Li and at least six others yesterday, we are faced with a pressing emergency. Hong Kongers, overseas diaspora communities, and even Canadians supporting Hong Kong democratic movements are under threat.
黎智英、周庭、李宇軒、李宗澤及最少另外六位社運人士昨日被捕，可見情勢已變得相當嚴峻。香港人、各個海外支援團體以及支持香港社運的加拿大人亦無可避免地受到威脅。

We need the Canadian government to take immediate action to offer a safe haven for Hong Kongers fleeing persecution and to use sanctions and other tools with international allies to quell
我們要求加拿大政府立即採取行動，為港人提供「避風港」並聯同其它國家制裁害港官員。

[size=5]=> 怕唔怕激嬲加拿大國會議員㗎？嗱，
佢哋咁講㗎[/size=4]

用gmail:
http://alliancecanadahk.com/achk-email-campaign-gmail

=> Why email MPs? 點解寫電郵俾議員？
https://facebook.com/alliancecanhk/posts/169635047885583


>> Email template is available below:
>> 電郵範本如下：



justin.trudeau@parl.gc.ca
DPM-VPM@dpmo-cvpm.gc.ca
Francois-Philippe.Champagne@international.gc.ca
Minister@cic.gc.ca
Rob.Oliphant@parl.gc.ca
Omar.Alghabra@parl.gc.ca
Soraya.MartinezFerrada@parl.gc.ca
IRCC.Minister-Ministre.IRCC@cic.gc.ca

_________________

Dear Ministers and Parliamentary Secretaries,

It is with immense anger and desperation that I write to you today to demand immediate action.

Beijing is tightening its authoritarian grip in Hong Kong by arresting activists Jimmy Lai, and his family to use as hostages while detaining four Senior Executives of his media company to eradicate press freedoms. Prominent figures like Andy Li, who coordinated the independent Election Observation Mission to Hong Kong with MP Kenny Chiu, along with journalist Wilson Li, and activist Agnes Chow were also arrested. We are seeing the gradual destruction of a once-free city that countless Canadians call home. Ottawa MUST provide resettlement pathways for those looking to flee mass detention, torture, and persecution.

Why has our government not taken strong measures for human rights? Why has there been no immigration scheme for Uyghurs facing mass-detention in concentration camps? When we see Beijing's claws tightening around not just its own people but around Canadians too - what would it take to see more than empty statements expressing "concern?"

We urgently demand that the Canadian government:

* Join the international community in levying sanctions against human rights offenders in Hong Kong and China
* Immediately offer a path for resettlement to help Hong Kongers, Uyghurs, and others flee mass detention, torture and persecution

The time is now for Canada to act: not issue yet another statement expressing “concern.” We Canadians can’t let Ottawa do nothing when Beijing tries to silence us – even here in Canada.

Sincerely
我要上熱門！！！！！

Dear Ministers and Parliamentary Secretaries,

It is with immense anger and desperation that I write to you today to demand immediate action.

Beijing is tightening its authoritarian grip in Hong Kong by arresting activists Jimmy Lai, and his family to use as hostages while detaining four Senior Executives of his media company to eradicate press freedoms. Prominent figures like Andy Li, who coordinated the independent Election Observation Mission to Hong Kong with MP Kenny Chiu, along with journalist Wilson Li, and activist Agnes Chow were also arrested. We are seeing the gradual destruction of a once-free city that countless Canadians call home. Ottawa MUST provide resettlement pathways for those looking to flee mass detention, torture, and persecution.

Why has our government not taken strong measures for human rights? Why has there been no immigration scheme for Uyghurs facing mass-detention in concentration camps? When we see Beijing's claws tightening around not just its own people but around Canadians too - what would it take to see more than empty statements expressing "concern?"

We urgently demand that the Canadian government:

* Join the international community in levying sanctions against human rights offenders in Hong Kong and China
* Immediately offer a path for resettlement to help Hong Kongers, Uyghurs, and others flee mass detention, torture and persecution

The time is now for Canada to act: not issue yet another statement expressing “concern.” We Canadians can’t let Ottawa do nothing when Beijing tries to silence us – even here in Canada.

Sincerely
